purpose: Template for separate Agent visibility approval after loader evidence exists.
required_preconditions: Artifact manifest is ready for loader execution.
Canonical loader run was separately approved and completed.
Loader run evidence matches the artifact manifest candidate count.
Rollback plan exists for Agent/RAG visibility changes.
non_goals: Does not execute the canonical loader.
Does not refresh RAG or Agent-visible data.
Does not approve deployment by itself.
